name: Sidebar Navigation
purpose: Primary application navigation for a dashboard or AI workspace shell.

structures.name: Nested Nav Item
structures.notes: Used for saved spaces or section drill-down.

structures.name: Utility Footer Nav
structures.notes: Contains settings, help, or upgrade entries.

interactionNotes: Use sidebar-specific tokens for the shell instead of generic surface tokens.
Selected state should feel filled and stable rather than loud.
